scope.summary: Load custom tools against the selected profile's actual operating-level ceiling, preserving refusal below that ceiling.
out_of_scope: Changing statement classification, a profile's configured maximum, or any operator authority over the fail-closed classifier.

entry_points.name: custom-tool catalog loading for an accepted profile snapshot
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp --bin oraclemcp custom_tool_loader_uses_each_profiles_real_ceiling: 1 passed in clean worktree at 419ff160; git diff 419ff160..667c0ec0 -- main.rs main_tests.rs was empty. The test proves READ_ONLY refuses static DML, READ_WRITE/DDL/ADMIN load it, and signed DDL refusal names the real READ_WRITE ceiling.

limitations: No live Oracle session is claimed; the behavior is deterministic loader and profile-ceiling coverage.
